response.justification: The candidate lacks the mandatory C++ experience on Windows platforms (5–10 years) and domain expertise in Fixed Income, Fixed Income Derivatives, or Investment Banking/Capital Markets. Their background is heavily skewed toward web, mobile, and embedded systems using languages like TypeScript, Node.js, JavaScript, and Dlang, with no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle experience or capital-markets domain exposure.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pair programming)
Proven ability to learn and adapt to new technologies quickly
concerns: No demonstrated C++ development experience on Windows platform (critical for role)
Lacks Fixed Income/Investment Banking domain expertise (mandatory requirement)
